titleStmt.title: SII 10.215: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 215. (A.R. No. 184 of 1917.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE TEMPLE OF AMARĒŚVARA, ZONNALAGEDDA, GUNTUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Undated.

summary.p: States that Ammana, son of Tikkana and grandson of Bhīma, lord of Amṛitapura in the Velanāṇḍu country, and a soldier serving under the Chōḍa King presented jayaghaṇṭa, dhūpārati and dīpārati to the temple of Vallabhēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīvelanāṁḍunāmaviṣayē vidvadvi
jaikāśrayē svā myāsī damritāṁhvayē pura va
rē śrībhīmanāmā dvijaḥ . haritānvayavā
¨rddhiva¨rddhanavidhō tasmā tsutōbhū tsutiḥ
khyāta . stikkana I tyagaṇyaguṇavān yeṟa
yāṁbikā naṁddanaḥ . śrī nnammananā
madhēyavidita ścātu¨ryyaśau¨ryyānvi
taḥ śrīcōḍakṣitipālakasya vahatāṁ
gō ya śśastrikāṁgō saṁstutaḥ vikhyātassubha
ṭāgraṇi ¨rbhbhuvi latsadbasthuciṁtāmaṇiḥ pa
tyuprāpta mahāprasādividitaṁ śrībhū
ṣaṇālaṁkritaṁ . sā¨rddhaṁ dakṣiṇahastava kṣuri kayā
śatruṁ haṁtyā jayaśrīkāṁttā satataṁ vahaṁti
vijayaśrīcōḍadhātrīpatiḥ . tatva¨rghaṇḍava
llabhēśvaradēvara kiccina jayaghaṁṭādūparati
dīpārati dēvarāju niccinabiṁdamuṁtta 1 .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vō yō hārēti vasuṁ dharā ṣaṣṭi ¨rvva
¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
